commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds context-engine host requirement metadata, advertises Codex/Pi capabilities, rejects unsupported hosts at run start, and adds doctor warning/repair logic plus docs/tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a feature/API PR rather than a current-main bug report. Source inspection confirms current main lacks the host requirement contract, and the PR proof exercises the new behavior.
commands.review_followup: A narrow automated repair can fix the doctor `auto` runtime accounting and add regression coverage, while final API and fail-closed approval remains a maintainer decision.

target.title: feat: add context-engine host capability requirements
target.body:
## What
This PR adds a host compatibility contract for context engines, uses it to block unsupported runtime/harness combinations with a descriptive error, and teaches `openclaw doctor` how to repair configs that select an incompatible context engine globally.

## Why
`lossless-claw` needs OpenClaw to assemble context before the model prompt. Generic CLI-style harnesses do not provide that behavior, so allowing them to boot with `lossless-claw` produces broken runtime behavior instead of a clear configuration failure.

## Changes
- Add context-engine host requirement metadata
- Advertise native Codex and Pi capabilities
- Reject unsupported agent-run hosts early
- Add doctor preview and repair checks
- Preserve mixed-runtime configs with warnings

## Testing
- `pnpm test src/context-engine/host-compat.test.ts src/commands/doctor/shared/context-engine-host-compat.test.ts src/commands/doctor/repair-sequencing.test.ts src/commands/doctor/shared/preview-warnings.test.ts` - passed, 4 files / 46 tests across 3 shards.
- `pnpm test src/commands/doctor-config-flow.test.ts` - passed, 34 tests.
- `pnpm tsgo:core` - passed.
- `pnpm lint:core` - passed.
- `pnpm plugin-sdk:api:check` - passed.
- `pnpm build` - passed.
- `launchctl kickstart -k gui/501/ai.openclaw.gateway` - restarted the live gateway from the rebased build.

## Real Behavior Proof
Behavior addressed: OpenClaw now fails closed when a selected context engine declares host requirements that the selected agent runtime cannot satisfy. `openclaw doctor --fix` repairs the global context-engine slot only when every configured agent-run host is incompatible.

Real environment tested: local macOS launchd gateway from `/Users/phaedrus/Projects/clawdbot`, plus isolated temp config copies under `/tmp/openclaw-doctor-hostcompat.ZDwdgg` with `OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH`, isolated `OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR`, and `OPENCLAW_SERVICE_REPAIR_POLICY=external`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:
```text
node dist/index.js config get plugins.slots.contextEngine
launchctl print gui/501/ai.openclaw.gateway | rg -n "state|pid|last exit|program|working directory"
lsof -iTCP:18789 -sTCP:LISTEN -n -P

OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH=/tmp/openclaw-doctor-hostcompat.ZDwdgg/openclaw.codex-cli.json \
OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR=/tmp/openclaw-doctor-hostcompat.ZDwdgg/state-codex \
OPENCLAW_SERVICE_REPAIR_POLICY=external \
node dist/index.js doctor --fix --non-interactive

OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH=/tmp/openclaw-doctor-hostcompat.ZDwdgg/openclaw.claude-cli.json \
OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR=/tmp/openclaw-doctor-hostcompat.ZDwdgg/state-claude \
OPENCLAW_SERVICE_REPAIR_POLICY=external \
node dist/index.js doctor --fix --non-interactive

OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH=/tmp/openclaw-doctor-hostcompat.ZDwdgg/openclaw.only-claude-cli.json \
OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR=/tmp/openclaw-doctor-hostcompat.ZDwdgg/state-only-claude \
OPENCLAW_SERVICE_REPAIR_POLICY=external \
node dist/index.js doctor --fix --non-interactive
```

Evidence after fix:
```text
Live gateway:
plugins.slots.contextEngine = lossless-claw
state = running
program = /Users/phaedrus/.openclaw/service-env/ai.openclaw.gateway-env-wrapper.sh
pid = 95941
node 95941 phaedrus ... TCP 127.0.0.1:18789 (LISTEN)

codex-cli temp config:
before: openai/gpt-5.5 agentRuntime.id = codex-cli, contextEngine = lossless-claw
doctor --fix: Moved agents.defaults.models.openai/gpt-5.5 agentRuntime.id from codex-cli to codex.
after: openai/gpt-5.5 agentRuntime.id = codex, contextEngine = lossless-claw

mixed claude-cli + codex temp config:
before: openai/gpt-5.5 agentRuntime.id = claude-cli; other OpenAI defaults use codex; contextEngine = lossless-claw
doctor --fix: reports lossless-claw incompatible with CLI backend claude-cli and says some runtimes support it, so it will not set plugins.slots.contextEngine to legacy.
after: openai/gpt-5.5 agentRuntime.id = claude-cli, contextEngine = lossless-claw

only claude-cli temp config:
before: only configured agent-run host is claude-cli, contextEngine = lossless-claw
doctor --fix: Set plugins.slots.contextEngine to "legacy" because context engine "lossless-claw" is incompatible with every configured agent-run host.
after: openai/gpt-5.5 agentRuntime.id = claude-cli, contextEngine = legacy
```

Observed result after fix: native Codex and Pi satisfy `assemble-before-prompt`, live startup keeps `lossless-claw` enabled, legacy `codex-cli` config repairs to native `codex`, mixed compatible/incompatible runtime configs warn without a global slot rewrite, and all-incompatible CLI configs repair `plugins.slots.contextEngine` to `"legacy"`.

What was not tested: no live user config was changed to `claude-cli`; the `doctor --fix` repair behavior was verified against isolated temp config files.
target.author: jalehman

commands.reason: author association CONTRIBUTOR and repository permission none are not allowed

node 95941 phaedrus ... TCP 127.0.0.1:18789 (LISTEN)

codex-cli temp config:
before: openai/gpt-5.5 agentRuntime.id = codex-cli, contextEngine = lossless-claw
doctor --fix: Moved agents.defaults.models.openai/gpt-5.5 agentRuntime.id from codex-cli to codex.
after: openai/gpt-5.5 agentRuntime.id = codex, contextEngine = lossless-claw

mixed claude-cli + codex temp config:
before: openai/gpt-5.5 agentRuntime.id = claude-cli; other OpenAI defaults use codex; contextEngine = lossless-claw
doctor --fix: reports lossless-claw incompatible with CLI backend claude-cli and says some runtimes support it, so it will not set plugins.slots.contextEngine to legacy.
after: openai/gpt-5.5 agentRuntime.id = claude-cli, contextEngine = lossless-claw
